rulings.Case Title: JONATHAN S. STORPER VS. STEVEN DILLICK et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 09, 2014 line 1(Part 2 of 2). PLAINTIFF JONATHAN STORPER Motion For Attorney'S Fees. DENIED. Even if the attorney's fee provision in the settlement agreement is enforceable, Motion to Set Aside Default was not necessary/needed for the enforcement of the settlement agreement and was filed due to Plaintiff's mistaken reliance on statement of a courtroom clerk. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JONATHAN S. STORPER VS. STEVEN DILLICK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Moiton Of Ptlf To Enforce Settlement On Record And Enter Jdugment Thereon Under Ccp 64.6
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 09, 2014 line 1(Part 1 of 2). PLAINTIFF JONATHAN STORPER Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff To Enforce Settlement On Record And Enter Jdugment Thereon Under Ccp 64.6. DENIED. The terms of the stipulation pertain to defendants' community property. Stephanie Dillick did not personally agree to the oral settlement before judge Feinstein. Moving party failed to show that Stephanie gave consent, let alone written consent, for Steven to encumber her interest. Even if the settlement agreement may be enforceable against Steven, it cannot be enforced to the nature of the terms. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER et al VS. LEAH AHN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 09, 2014 line 2 (part 1 of 3). Order To Show Cause Why Order For Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue. GRANTED. Plaintiff complied with CCP 704.760. The amount of homestead exemption is $75,000. The amount of minimum bid is $665,000. Prevailing party prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PRIYA SANGER et al VS. LEAH AHN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Post-Judgment Collection Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs

PETITIONER PRIYA SANGER, MICHAEL SANGER Notice Of Motion And Motion For Post-Judgment Collection Of Attorneys' Fees And Costs. DENIED without prejudice. rulings.Case Title: ANNETTE HORNSBY VS. NEW CENTURY MORTGAGE CORPORATION et al
